speaker: speaker1
text: He's a year older than Keith , but he looks younger .

speaker: speaker1
text: He's fine . He retired last week . It's a turning point in his life . Now he can relax and enjoy his retirement .

speaker: speaker2
text: He can spend more time with his grandchildren .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , I don't think he wants to . He wants to travel to several different countries around the world .

speaker: speaker2
text: So , he wants to have a more active retirement . Good idea !

speaker: speaker1
text: How do you want to spend your old age ?
